summary: All 5 offline billing and thermal print features tested and verified working. Invoices page has 'Thermal Print' option in dropdown menu. Thermal Print dialog shows 58mm/80mm paper width selection with compact monospace preview. POS page has Sync Data and Cache buttons for offline functionality. Customer creation dialog available in POS. ThermalInvoice component properly renders compact invoice format.
passed_tests: Invoices page loads with stats cards and invoice table
New Invoice modal opens with customer/item selection
Invoice created successfully (INV-2602-4957 with Draft status)
Actions dropdown shows all options including 'Thermal Print' option
Thermal Print dialog opens with correct invoice number
Paper width selection shows 58mm (32 chars) and 80mm (48 chars) buttons
Clicking 58mm button switches preview to narrower format
Clicking 80mm button switches preview to wider format
Thermal invoice preview shows compact monospace format with all invoice details
POS page loads with 'Sync Data' button in header
POS page loads with 'Cache' button in header for offline data caching
POS page '+ Add Customer' dialog opens with Name, Phone, Email, Customer Type, GST Number fields
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: InvoicesPage.js (lines 884-885) has 'Thermal Print' DropdownMenuItem with Receipt icon
VERIFIED: InvoicesPage.js (lines 1795-1851) has thermal print dialog with paper width selection (58mm/80mm)
VERIFIED: ThermalInvoice.js has data-testid='thermal-invoice' and renders compact monospace format
VERIFIED: POSPage.js (lines 722-768) handleAddCustomer supports offline mode via createCustomerOffline
VERIFIED: POSPage.js (line 1115) uses trackInventoryOffline for inventory tracking
VERIFIED: OfflineContext.js has createCustomerOffline (line 653), trackInventoryOffline (line 580), checkStockOffline (line 624), saveReceiptOffline (line 723)
seed_data_creation: Created test invoice INV-2602-4957 (Draft status, ₹2,808.40) for testing thermal print dropdown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Offline billing features enhanced. Thermal print working in Invoices page. Invoice INV-2602-4957 exists for testing. POS page has Sync Data and Cache buttons. Customer creation supports offline mode.

thermal_print_dropdown_option.evidence: Actions dropdown shows: View, Edit, Record Payment, Print (A4), Thermal Print, Download PDF, Share via WhatsApp, Mark as Sent, Cancel, Delete

thermal_print_dialog.evidence: Dialog shows 'Thermal Print - INV-2602-4957' title with Paper Width selection (58mm/80mm buttons) and compact invoice preview

paper_width_selection.evidence: 58mm shows narrower format, 80mm shows wider format. Both buttons toggle correctly and update preview

pos_offline_buttons.evidence: POS page header shows 'Sync Data' and 'Cache' buttons for offline functionality

pos_customer_creation.evidence: '+' button next to Walk-in Customer opens 'Add New Customer' dialog with Name*, Phone*, Email, Customer Type*, GST Number fields
